iterations.theme: Regulatory Landscape of Crypto: MiCA, Clarity Act, and Market Dynamics

sections.subtitle: Filip Šarvanja: Novi Predsjednik UBIK-a i Stručnjak za Kripto Regulativu
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj predstavlja Filipa Šarvanju, novog predsjednika UBIK-a, ističući njegovu pozadinu u HANFA-i.
sections.content: U uvodnom dijelu intervjua na Cryptovers.hr, voditelj predstavlja **Filipa Šarvanju**, novog predsjednika Udruge za blockchain i kriptovalute (UBIK), najvažnije asocijacije za digitalnu imovinu u Hrvatskoj. Voditelj naglašava Šarvanjino dugogodišnje iskustvo u HANFA-i, ključnom hrvatskom financijskom regulatoru, što ga čini iznimno kvalificiranim za raspravu o regulatornom krajoliku kriptovaluta. Filip Šarvanja zahvaljuje na pozivu, spreman podijeliti svoje uvide o aktualnim temama u kripto svijetu.
sections.subtitle_en: Filip Šarvanja: New President of UBIK and Expert for Crypto Regulation
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host introduces Filip Šarvanja, the new president of UBIK, highlighting his background in HANFA.
sections.content_en: In the introductory part of the interview on Cryptovers.hr, the host introduces **Filip Šarvanja**, the new president of the Association for Blockchain and Cryptocurrencies (UBIK), the most important association for digital assets in Croatia. The host emphasizes Šarvanja's long-standing experience at HANFA, a key Croatian financial regulator, which makes him exceptionally qualified to discuss the regulatory landscape of cryptocurrencies. Filip Šarvanja thanks for the invitation, ready to share his insights on current topics in the crypto world.

sections.subtitle: Krhkost Kripto Tržišta: Poluga, Globalnost i Algoritmi
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja objašnjava razloge krhkosti i volatilnosti kripto tržišta.
sections.content: Voditelj započinje razgovor pitanjem o krhkosti kripto tržišta, koje stagnira od listopada, obilježenog rekordnim likvidacijama. Filip Šarvanja objašnjava da je tržište izrazito podložno špekulacijama, a ključni faktori su **visoka poluga** prisutna u sustavu te **globalna priroda** kriptovaluta. Za razliku od dioničkih ili obvezničkih tržišta, kripto tržište je mlado, funkcionira 24 sata dnevno, sedam dana u tjednu, što ga čini podložnijim kaskadnim efektima. Iako algoritmi igraju ulogu i na tradicionalnim tržištima, na kripto tržištu su njihovi učinci puno izraženiji zbog spomenutih karakteristika.
sections.subtitle_en: Fragility of Crypto Markets: Leverage, Globality, and Algorithms
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja explains the reasons for the fragility and volatility of the crypto market.
sections.content_en: The host starts the conversation with a question about the fragility of the crypto market, which has been stagnating since October, marked by record liquidations. Filip Šarvanja explains that the market is extremely susceptible to speculation, and the key factors are **high leverage** present in the system and the **global nature** of cryptocurrencies. Unlike stock or bond markets, the crypto market is young, operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week, which makes it more susceptible to cascading effects. Although algorithms play a role in traditional markets as well, in the crypto market their effects are much more pronounced due to the mentioned characteristics.

sections.subtitle: Pokretači Novog Rasta: Od Špekulacije do Fundamenata
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja govori o potrebi za fundamentalnim pokretačima rasta kripto tržišta.
sections.content: Kada je riječ o ključnim okidačima za novi rast tržišta, Filip Šarvanja izražava oprez. Smatra da, za razliku od prijašnjih godina kada je rast bio vođen čistom špekulacijom, sada će biti potrebni **fundamenti**. Novi rast mora biti potaknut konkretnim aplikacijama i slučajevima upotrebe (use case), što bi onda moglo dovesti do nove špekulativne faze, slične onoj koja se trenutno vidi u sektorima poput umjetne inteligencije (AI).
sections.subtitle_en: Drivers of New Growth: From Speculation to Fundamentals
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja speaks about the need for fundamental drivers of crypto market growth.
sections.content_en: When it comes to key triggers for new market growth, Filip Šarvanja expresses caution. He believes that, unlike previous years when growth was driven by pure speculation, now **fundamentals** will be needed. New growth must be driven by concrete applications and use cases, which could then lead to a new speculative phase, similar to what is currently seen in sectors like artificial intelligence (AI).

sections.subtitle: Manipulacija Tržištem: Utjecaj Velikih Igrača i Prilike za Arbitražu
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja objašnjava kako veliki igrači utječu na tržište i mogućnosti arbitraže.
sections.content: Voditelj postavlja pitanje o manipulacijama tržištem od strane velikih igrača, spominjući teorije o 'Jane Streetu'. Filip Šarvanja ističe da je **svako tržište podložno manipulaciji** velikih igrača, bilo da se radi o dioničkim, obvezničkim ili kripto tržištima. Iako ne koristi riječ 'manipulacija' u grubom smislu, naglašava da najveći trading deskovi imaju ogroman utjecaj. Objašnjava da, iako se izlažu riziku, veliki igrači mogu na potpuno legitiman i legalan način provoditi arbitražu i likvidacije, posebno na globalnom kripto tržištu koje radi 24/7. Kripto tržište, s velikim brojem malih ulagatelja, pruža izvanredne prilike za algoritamski orijentirane firme. Šarvanja također spominje teoriju zavjere da 'legacy' institucije žele kontrolirati 'budućnost financija' (future of finance) po svojim uvjetima, koristeći svoju moć na još uvijek malom kripto tržištu.
sections.subtitle_en: Market Manipulation: Influence of Big Players and Arbitrage Opportunities
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja explains how big players influence the market and arbitrage opportunities.
sections.content_en: The host asks a question about market manipulations by large players, mentioning theories about 'Jane Street'. Filip Šarvanja points out that **every market is subject to manipulation** by large players, whether it concerns stock, bond, or crypto markets. Although he does not use the word 'manipulation' in a crude sense, he emphasizes that the largest trading desks have enormous influence. He explains that, although they expose themselves to risk, large players can legitimately and legally conduct arbitrage and liquidations, especially on the global crypto market which operates 24/7. The crypto market, with a large number of small investors, provides extraordinary opportunities for algorithmically oriented firms. Šarvanja also mentions a conspiracy theory that 'legacy' institutions want to control 'the future of finance' (future of finance) on their own terms, using their power in the still small crypto market.

sections.subtitle: Regulacija kao Zaštita: Borba Protiv Prevara i Očuvanje Malih Ulagatelja
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja govori o ulozi regulacije u zaštiti malih ulagatelja od prevara.
sections.content: Na pitanje može li regulacija spriječiti manipulacije, Filip Šarvanja odgovara potvrdno, posebno u kontekstu **zaštite malih ulagatelja**. Ističe da je kripto tržište prepuno prevara, koje su često istovjetne onima u tradicionalnim financijama, ali su u kripto svijetu učinkovitije zbog globalne prirode i brzine iznošenja novca. UBIK, čiji je Filip predsjednik, organizira meetup u Zadru upravo na temu prevara povezanih s kripto imovinom. Regulacija je ključna za smanjenje rizika za 'retail' ulagatelje.
sections.subtitle_en: Regulation as Protection: The Fight Against Fraud and the Protection of Small Investors
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja speaks about the role of regulation in protecting small investors from scams.
sections.content_en: To the question of whether regulation can prevent manipulations, Filip Šarvanja answers affirmatively, especially in the context of **protection of small investors**. He points out that the crypto market is full of scams, which are often identical to those in traditional finance, but are more effective in the crypto world due to the global nature and speed of money withdrawal. UBIK, of which Filip is president, is organizing a meetup in Zadar precisely on the topic of scams related to crypto assets. Regulation is crucial for reducing risks for 'retail' investors.

sections.subtitle: MiCA: Transformacija Kripto Pružatelja Usluga u Tradicionalne Financijske Igrače
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja detaljno objašnjava kako MiCA regulativa mijenja poslovanje CASP-ova.
sections.content: Europa je prešla na aktivno provođenje regulative s MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets) zakonom. Filip Šarvanja objašnjava da MiCA **transformira centralizirane pružatelje usluga** (CASP-ove) – burze, brokere, novčanike – u tradicionalne financijske institucije. Ovaj proces je iznimno skup i težak. CASP-ovi sada moraju ispunjavati stroge zahtjeve: licenciranje upravljanja, iskustvo i provjera osoba na ključnim funkcijama, praćenje imovine i sukoba interesa, te održavanje regulatornog kapitala za namirenje klijenata u slučaju propasti. Svrha ovih pravila je prvenstveno zaštita malih ulagatelja i smanjenje šireg sistemskog rizika.
sections.subtitle_en: MiCA: Transformation of Crypto Service Providers into Traditional Financial Players
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja explains in detail how the MiCA regulation changes the business operations of CASPs.
sections.content_en: Europe has moved to active enforcement of regulation with the MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets) law. Filip Šarvanja explains that MiCA **transforms centralized service providers** (CASPs) – exchanges, brokers, wallets – into traditional financial institutions. This process is extremely expensive and difficult. CASPs must now meet strict requirements: management licensing, experience and vetting of persons in key functions, monitoring of assets and conflicts of interest, and maintaining regulatory capital for client settlement in case of failure. The purpose of these rules is primarily the protection of small investors and the reduction of broader systemic risk.

sections.subtitle: MiCA i Konkurencija: Strah od Centralizacije i Regulatorne Arbitraže
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja kritički analizira MiCA-in utjecaj na konkurenciju i centralizaciju nadzora u EU.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja se slaže s ocjenom da će MiCA **smanjiti konkurenciju** među centraliziranim pružateljima usluga. Najveći problem MiCA-e vidi u pokušaju Europske unije da centralizira nadzor CASP-ova pod Europskom agencijom za vrijednosne papire i tržišta (ESMA) i Europskom agencijom za bankarstvo (EBA), s ciljem da svi CASP-ovi budu pod nadzorom iz Pariza. To bi drastično povećalo regulatorne troškove, naštetilo malim ulagateljima i povisilo cijene usluga. Šarvanja ističe da EU nema dovoljno snage spriječiti globalne igrače koji neće uzeti MiCA licencu, ali će i dalje djelovati na europskom tržištu. Postoji i rizik **regulatorne arbitraže**, gdje će tvrtke tražiti jurisdikcije s povoljnijim uvjetima, što se već vidjelo na primjeru Austrije i tvrtki poput KuCoina, koje su dobile licence, ali su se suočile s brzim zabranama zbog neusklađenosti.
sections.subtitle_en: MiCA and Competition: Fear of Centralization and Regulatory Arbitrage
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja critically analyzes MiCA's impact on competition and the centralization of oversight in the EU.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja agrees with the assessment that MiCA will **reduce competition** among centralized service providers. He sees MiCA's biggest problem in the European Union's attempt to centralize the supervision of CASPs under the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) and the European Banking Authority (EBA), with the aim that all CASPs be supervised from Paris. This would drastically increase regulatory costs, harm small investors, and raise service prices. Šarvanja points out that the EU does not have enough power to prevent global players who will not take a MiCA license but will still operate on the European market. There is also the risk of **regulatory arbitrage**, where companies will seek jurisdictions with more favorable conditions, which has already been seen in the example of Austria and companies like KuCoin, which obtained licenses but faced quick bans due to non-compliance.

sections.subtitle: Izazovi Regulacije DeFi-ja: Neodređenost i 'Pandorina Kutija' Tradicionalnih Financija
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja objašnjava poteškoće u regulaciji decentraliziranih financija (DeFi) unutar MiCA okvira.
sections.content: Jedno od najzanimljivijih poglavlja MiCA-e odnosi se na **DeFi (decentralizirane financije)**. Filip Šarvanja, koji je sudjelovao u izradi MiCA-e, objašnjava da inicijalni tekst Europske komisije nije dirao DeFi. Kasnije su zakonodavci pokušali uključiti DeFi, ali bez dovoljno razumijevanja, što je rezultiralo neodređenim definicijama decentralizacije i distribuiranosti. Hrvatska je imala prijedlog za 'Safe Harbor' za decentralizirane aplikacije, ali nije uspio doći na dnevni red. Trenutni stav je nejasan: ako nije moguće utvrditi tko upravlja aplikacijom, ona je izuzeta. Šarvanja upozorava da se ovime otvara 'Pandorina kutija' tradicionalne financijske regulative (MiFID, PSD2), gdje se pokušava primijeniti stare definicije na nove tehnologije, poput 'unhosted' novčanika, što dovodi do nejasnog i neprovedivog administrativnog okvira.
sections.subtitle_en: Challenges of DeFi Regulation: Indeterminacy and 'Pandora's Box' of Traditional Finance
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja explains the difficulties in the regulation of decentralized finance (DeFi) within the MiCA framework.
sections.content_en: One of the most interesting chapters of MiCA refers to **DeFi (decentralized finance)**. Filip Šarvanja, who participated in the drafting of MiCA, explains that the initial text of the European Commission did not touch DeFi. Later, legislators tried to include DeFi, but without sufficient understanding, which resulted in undefined definitions of decentralization and distributedness. Croatia had a proposal for a 'Safe Harbor' for decentralized applications, but it did not manage to get on the agenda. The current position is unclear: if it is not possible to determine who manages the application, it is exempt. Šarvanja warns that this opens 'Pandora's box' of traditional financial regulation (MiFID, PSD2), where old definitions are attempted to be applied to new technologies, such as 'unhosted' wallets, which leads to an unclear and unenforceable administrative framework.

sections.subtitle: EU kao Regulatorni Lider ili Birokrat? MiCA i Administrativna Složenost
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja raspravlja o tome je li EU regulatorni lider ili pretjerano oprezan birokrat s MiCA-om.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja razmatra je li EU s MiCA-om postala regulatorni lider ili pretjerano oprezan birokrat. Smatra da je u području CASP-ova EU bila lider, jer je MiCA uvelike **kopija odredbi MiFID-a** (Markets in Financial Instruments Directive). Ipak, ističe da postoje administrativne složenosti u postupcima licenciranja. Uspoređuje to s tradicionalnim financijskim institucijama koje su licence dobivale u 'davna vremena' kada regulativa nije bila toliko stroga. Sada se novi kripto igrači suočavaju s rigoroznim zahtjevima, što otežava ulazak na tržište i stvara 'hipernormiranost'. Šarvanja zaključuje da, iako MiCA donosi određenu jasnoću, administrativni okvir bi se mogao pojednostaviti.
sections.subtitle_en: EU as Regulatory Leader or Bureaucrat? MiCA and Administrative Complexity
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja discusses whether the EU is a regulatory leader or an overly cautious bureaucrat with MiCA.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja considers whether the EU with MiCA has become a regulatory leader or an overly cautious bureaucrat. He believes that in the area of CASPs, the EU was a leader, because MiCA is largely a **copy of the provisions of MiFID** (Markets in Financial Instruments Directive). However, he points out that there are administrative complexities in licensing procedures. He compares this to traditional financial institutions that obtained licenses in 'ancient times' when regulation was not so strict. Now, new crypto players face rigorous requirements, which complicates market entry and creates 'hyper-regulation'. Šarvanja concludes that, although MiCA brings a certain clarity, the administrative framework could be simplified.

sections.subtitle: Utjecaj Stroge Regulacije na Likvidnost i Izbor Lokacije za Startupe
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja govori o tome kako stroga regulacija utječe na likvidnost i odluke startupa o lokaciji.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja procjenjuje da **institucionalna likvidnost** nikada nije bila dominantno prisutna u EU, već se odvijala u jurisdikcijama poput Švicarske. Veliki globalni igrači ne trebaju MiCA licencu da bi nastavili djelovati. Za startupe, odluka o lokaciji (EU ili SAD) često ovisi o tome gdje su alocirani fondovi njihovih investitora. Šarvanja također ističe da su vremena kada se poslovalo isključivo 'offshore' (npr. Kajmanski otoci) prošla, jer je to postalo preskupo i nepraktično za većinu, osim za najveće globalne igrače.
sections.subtitle_en: Impact of Strict Regulation on Liquidity and Location Choice for Startups
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja speaks about how strict regulation affects liquidity and startups' decisions about location.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja estimates that **institutional liquidity** has never been dominantly present in the EU, but rather took place in jurisdictions like Switzerland. Large global players do not need a MiCA license to continue operating. For startups, the decision on location (EU or USA) often depends on where their investors' funds are allocated. Šarvanja also points out that the times when business was conducted exclusively 'offshore' (e.g., Cayman Islands) are over, as it has become too expensive and impractical for most, except for the largest global players.

sections.subtitle: EU vs. SAD: Predvidljivost Regulacije u Kripto Sektoru
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja uspoređuje regulatorne pristupe EU i SAD-a u kripto sektoru, naglašavajući predvidljivost EU.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja smatra da EU ima potencijal postati **sigurnija luka za kripto kompanije** od SAD-a, prvenstveno zbog manje politizacije regulative. Dok je u SAD-u kripto postao izrazito političko pitanje, u EU, unatoč pokušajima Europske središnje banke (ECB) i nekih dijelova ESMA-e da ga politiziraju, većina donositelja politika ne politizira to pitanje. EU je donijela regulativu koja, iako možda nije savršena, je statična i **predvidljiva**. Šarvanja izražava zabrinutost zbog 'hektičnosti' američkog političkog sustava, što bi moglo utjecati na dugoročnu stabilnost regulatornog okvira i ulaganja.
sections.subtitle_en: EU vs. US: Predictability of Regulation in the Crypto Sector
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja compares the regulatory approaches of the EU and the USA in the crypto sector, emphasizing the predictability of the EU.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja believes that the EU has the potential to become a **safer haven for crypto companies** than the USA, primarily due to less politicization of regulation. While in the USA crypto has become a distinctly political issue, in the EU, despite attempts by the European Central Bank (ECB) and some parts of ESMA to politicize it, most policymakers do not politicize this issue. The EU has adopted regulation which, although perhaps not perfect, is static and **predictable**. Šarvanja expresses concern due to the 'hectic nature' of the American political system, which could affect the long-term stability of the regulatory framework and investments.

sections.subtitle: Clarity Act: Pojednostavljenje Licenciranja u SAD-u i Potencijalni 'Game Changer'
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja objašnjava kako Clarity Act može pojednostaviti licenciranje kripto tvrtki u SAD-u.
sections.content: Prelazeći na SAD, voditelj uvodi temu **Clarity Act-a**, zakona koji se predstavlja kao potencijalni 'game changer'. Filip Šarvanja objašnjava da je trenutno u SAD-u iznimno komplicirano pružati kripto usluge, jer tvrtke moraju dobiti licence u svakoj od pedesetak saveznih država. Clarity Act bi trebao pojednostaviti ovaj proces omogućavanjem **jedinstvene federalne licence**, što bi značajno smanjilo troškove i administrativni teret. To bi omogućilo tvrtkama da djeluju na razini cijelog SAD-a s jednom dozvolom, što bi bio ogroman korak naprijed za kripto industriju u Americi.
sections.subtitle_en: Simplification of Licensing in the USA and Potential 'Game Changer'
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja explains how the Clarity Act can simplify the licensing of crypto companies in the USA.
sections.content_en: Moving on to the USA, the host introduces the topic of the **Clarity Act**, a law that is presented as a potential 'game changer'. Filip Šarvanja explains that it is currently extremely complicated to provide crypto services in the USA, because companies must obtain licenses in each of the fifty federal states. The Clarity Act should simplify this process by enabling a **single federal license**, which would significantly reduce costs and administrative burden. This would allow companies to operate across the entire USA with one permit, which would be a huge step forward for the crypto industry in America.

sections.subtitle: Stablecoini i Banke: Borba za Prinos i Utjecaj Clarity Act-a
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja govori o utjecaju Clarity Act-a na stablecoine i lobiranju banaka.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja ističe značajan utjecaj Clarity Act-a na **stablecoine**. Prema stavu SEC-a, stablecoini se tretiraju slično 'money market' fondovima, što bi brokerima omogućilo da ih drže u svojim knjigama. To bi bio 'brutalan game changer', jer bi investicijska društva mogla koristiti licencirane stablecoine za razne operativne svrhe. Međutim, Šarvanja napominje da **banke aktivno lobiraju** protiv takvih odredbi, strahujući od konkurencije koju stablecoini nude s potencijalno višim prinosima. Smatra da je 'smiješno' da se tako velike 'legacy' institucije bore protiv inovacija koje bi mogle ponuditi bolje uvjete od njihovih tradicionalnih proizvoda.
sections.subtitle_en: Stablecoins and Banks: The Fight for Yield and the Impact of the Clarity Act
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja speaks about the impact of the Clarity Act on stablecoins and the lobbying of banks.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja highlights the significant impact of the Clarity Act on **stablecoins**. According to the SEC's stance, stablecoins are treated similarly to 'money market' funds, which would allow brokers to hold them on their books. This would be a 'brutal game changer', because investment firms could use licensed stablecoins for various operational purposes. However, Šarvanja notes that **banks are actively lobbying** against such provisions, fearing the competition that stablecoins offer with potentially higher yields. He considers it 'ridiculous' that such large 'legacy' institutions are fighting against innovations that could offer better conditions than their traditional products.

sections.subtitle: Sinergija Tradicionalnih Financija i Blockchaina: Sigurnost i Inovacija
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja objašnjava važnost sinergije tradicionalnih financija i blockchain tehnologije.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja naglašava važnost **ravnoteže između tradicionalnih financija i blockchain tehnologije**. Iako je predsjednik UBIK-a, brani tradicionalne financijske institucije zbog njihove dokazane sigurnosti. Ističe da, unatoč nedostatku 'seksi aplikacija', banke pružaju stabilnost i sigurnost za velike sume novca, što je ključno u slučaju incidenata poput 'phishinga'. Smatra da je budućnost u sinergiji, gdje će blockchain služiti kao infrastruktura, posebno za nove tehnologije poput **AI botova i agenata**, koji već postaju stvarnost.
sections.subtitle_en: Synergy of Traditional Finance and Blockchain: Security and Innovation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja explains the importance of the synergy of traditional finance and blockchain technology.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja emphasizes the importance of **balance between traditional finance and blockchain technology**. Although he is the president of UBIK, he defends traditional financial institutions due to their proven security. He points out that, despite the lack of 'sexy applications', banks provide stability and security for large sums of money, which is crucial in case of incidents like 'phishing'. He believes that the future lies in synergy, where blockchain will serve as infrastructure, especially for new technologies like **AI bots and agents**, which are already becoming a reality.

sections.subtitle: Regulacija kao Katalizator: Institucionalna Adopcija i BlackRock
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja govori o pozitivnom utjecaju regulacije i institucionalne adopcije, s naglaskom na BlackRock.
sections.content: Dugoročno gledano, Filip Šarvanja vjeruje da će i MiCA i Clarity Act imati **pozitivan utjecaj na kripto sektor**. Regulacija signalizira da je kripto 'tu da ostane'. Ključni pokazatelj je **institucionalna adopcija**, gdje najveće svjetske institucije, poput BlackRocka, sada aktivno ulaze u kripto prostor. Šarvanja ističe da BlackRock, jedan od najvećih fondova na svijetu, koristi DeFi infrastrukturu poput Uniswapa za svoj fond, što je donedavno zvučalo 'suludo'. To pokazuje da čak i 'legacy' igrači prepoznaju potencijal public blockchain infrastrukture, čak i ako je 'omotana' u regulirani okvir.
sections.subtitle_en: Regulation as Catalyst: Institutional Adoption and BlackRock
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja speaks about the positive impact of regulation and institutional adoption, with an emphasis on BlackRock.
sections.content_en: Long-term, Filip Šarvanja believes that both MiCA and the Clarity Act will have a **positive impact on the crypto sector**. Regulation signals that crypto is 'here to stay'. A key indicator is **institutional adoption**, where the world's largest institutions, such as BlackRock, are now actively entering the crypto space. Šarvanja points out that BlackRock, one of the largest funds in the world, uses DeFi infrastructure like Uniswap for its fund, which until recently sounded 'insane'. This shows that even 'legacy' players recognize the potential of public blockchain infrastructure, even if it is 'wrapped' in a regulated framework.

sections.subtitle: Globalna Regulatorna Fragmentacija i Potreba za Ekvivalentnošću
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja objašnjava izazove globalne regulatorne fragmentacije i potrebu za ekvivalentnošću između EU i SAD-a.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja priznaje da je **regulatorna fragmentacija** uvijek postojala, ali ističe da u tradicionalnim financijama EU i SAD međusobno prepoznaju značajan dio svojih regulatornih aranžmana. MiCA je bila prva, ali pitanje je hoće li drugi regulatorni okviri, poput američkog Clarity Act-a, biti smatrani 'MiCA ekvivalentom'. Šarvanja vjeruje da će se s vremenom američka i EU politika 'sinkronizirati' i prepoznati ekvivalentnost svojih režima, što će omogućiti lakše prekogranično trgovanje i transparentnost.
sections.subtitle_en: Global Regulatory Fragmentation and the Need for Equivalence
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja explains the challenges of global regulatory fragmentation and the need for equivalence between the EU and the US.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja acknowledges that **regulatory fragmentation** has always existed, but points out that in traditional finance, the EU and the US mutually recognize a significant part of their regulatory arrangements. MiCA was the first, but the question is whether other regulatory frameworks, such as the American Clarity Act, will be considered 'MiCA equivalent'. Šarvanja believes that over time, American and EU policies will 'synchronize' and recognize the equivalence of their regimes, which will enable easier cross-border trading and transparency.

sections.subtitle: Regulatorna Jasnoća: Ključ za Institucionalni Kapital i Rast Tržišta
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja naglašava da je regulatorna jasnoća neophodna za rast kripto tržišta i privlačenje institucionalnog kapitala.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja kategorički tvrdi da **kripto tržište ne može rasti bez regulatorne jasnoće**. Najveće sume novca na svijetu nalaze se u reguliranim institucijama, koje neće alocirati kapital u public blockchain bez 'omotavanja' u regulirani okvir. Iako mu je kao stručnjaku za regulativu 'preko glave' svih finesa, priznaje da je regulacija nužna. Smatra da bi se regulativa trebala olakšati, posebno u EU koja ima 'padajuće tržište' i problem 'hipernormiranosti', ali to je, kako kaže, pitanje za politiku.
sections.subtitle_en: Regulatory Clarity: Key for Institutional Capital and Market Growth
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja emphasizes that regulatory clarity is necessary for the growth of the crypto market and attracting institutional capital.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja categorically claims that **the crypto market cannot grow without regulatory clarity**. The largest sums of money in the world are in regulated institutions, which will not allocate capital to public blockchain without 'wrapping' it in a regulated framework. Although as a regulatory expert he is 'fed up' with all the nuances, he admits that regulation is necessary. He believes that regulation should be eased, especially in the EU which has a 'falling market' and a problem of 'hyper-regulation', but that is, as he says, a question for politics.

sections.subtitle: Kripto Evolucija: Od Decentralizirane Revolucije do Integrirane Infrastrukture
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja govori o evoluciji kriptovaluta, od decentralizirane revolucije do integracije u sustav, s fokusom na DeFi.
sections.content: Filip Šarvanja ne bi bio tako grub da kaže da kriptovaluta više nije decentralizirana revolucija, već dio sustava. Smatra da su centralizirani posrednici (CASP-ovi) oduvijek obavljali djelatnost financijske institucije, a MiCA regulativa je došla u pravo vrijeme. Što se tiče **DeFi-ja**, on je i dalje nereguliran i eksperimentalan. Šarvanja se nada da će biti razuma da se DeFi ne pokuša previše regulirati, jer je još uvijek premalen i nedovoljno shvaćen od strane donositelja politika. Predviđa da će DeFi postati **infrastruktura** za financijske institucije koje su spremne učiti i integrirati ga, kao što to već rade najveća društva za upravljanje fondovima.
sections.subtitle_en: Crypto Evolution: From Decentralized Revolution to Integrated Infrastructure
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja speaks about the evolution of cryptocurrencies, from a decentralized revolution to integration into the system, with a focus on DeFi.
sections.content_en: Filip Šarvanja would not be so harsh as to say that cryptocurrency is no longer a decentralized revolution, but rather a part of the system. He believes that centralized intermediaries (CASPs) have always performed the activity of a financial institution, and the MiCA regulation came at the right time. As for **DeFi**, it is still unregulated and experimental. Šarvanja hopes that there will be reason not to try to over-regulate DeFi, because it is still too small and insufficiently understood by policymakers. He predicts that DeFi will become **infrastructure** for financial institutions that are ready to learn and integrate it, as the largest fund management companies are already doing.

sections.subtitle: Savjeti za Blockchain Startupe: 'Bear Market' kao Vrijeme za Izgradnju i Učenje
sections.screenshot_description: Filip Šarvanja daje savjete startupima u blockchain sektoru, ističući ulogu UBIK-a.
sections.content: Za kraj, Filip Šarvanja, kao predsjednik UBIK-a, nudi savjete tvrtkama, developerima i startupima koji ulaze u blockchain sektor. Ističe da je takozvani **'bear market' najbolje tržište za 'buildanje'**, odnosno za razvoj, učenje i izgradnju. Poziva sve zainteresirane za blockchain, posebno u regiji (Hrvatska, Slovenija), da se pridruže UBIK-u. Udruga nudi kapacitete ljudi koji poznaju i tradicionalni i kripto sektor, služeći kao **most između ta dva svijeta**. Šarvanja zaključuje da je sada pravi trenutak za razvoj u kripto svijetu, a ne prije pet godina.
sections.subtitle_en: Tips for Blockchain Startups: 'Bear Market' as a Time for Building and Learning
sections.screenshot_description_en: Filip Šarvanja gives advice to startups in the blockchain sector, highlighting the role of UBIK.
sections.content_en: Finally, Filip Šarvanja, as president of UBIK, offers advice to companies, developers, and startups entering the blockchain sector. He points out that the so-called **'bear market' is the best market for 'building'**, that is, for development, learning, and construction. He invites all those interested in blockchain, especially in the region (Croatia, Slovenia), to join UBIK. The association offers the capacities of people who know both the traditional and crypto sectors, serving as a **bridge between these two worlds**. Šarvanja concludes that now is the right moment for development in the crypto world, and not five years ago.

sections.subtitle: Završne Riječi i Poziv na Praćenje Cryptovers.hr
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj zahvaljuje Filipu Šarvanji i poziva gledatelje na praćenje Cryptovers.hr.
sections.content: Voditelj se zahvaljuje Filipu Šarvanji na gostovanju i želi mu puno uspjeha s UBIK-om. Također, zahvaljuje gledateljima na pozornosti i poziva ih da lajkaju, komentiraju i pretplate se na kanal Cryptovers.hr, te da prate portal i društvene mreže za daljnje informacije o kripto svijetu.
sections.subtitle_en: Final Words and Call to Follow Cryptovers.hr
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host thanks Filip Šarvanja and invites viewers to follow Cryptovers.hr.
sections.content_en: The host thanks Filip Šarvanja for his guest appearance and wishes him much success with UBIK. Also, he thanks the viewers for their attention and invites them to like, comment, and subscribe to the Cryptovers.hr channel, and to follow the portal and social networks for further information about the crypto world.

iterations.theme_en: Regulatory Landscape of Crypto: MiCA, Clarity Act, and Market Dynamics
